entry.title: New IDC GS00Q12NRD4006 awarded to DRS TECHNICAL SERVICES, INC. for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: CONTRACT FOR WORLDWIDE COMMERCIAL SATELLITE COMMUNICATIONS (COMSATCOM) END-TO-END SATELLITE SOLUTIONS. (IGF::OT::IGF - OTHER FUNCTIONS - BECAUSE NOT DETERMINED TO BE IGF IAW FAR 7.503(D))

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

entry.title: IDC GS00Q12NRD4006 (P03) awarded to DRS TECHNICAL SERVICES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE PROCEDURES RELATED TO POSTING MONTHLY REPORTS TO THE GSA SATCOM REPORT PORTAL AND TO MODIFY SECTION I RELATED TO REQUIRED COMMERCIAL ITEM CLAUSES (IGF::OT::IGF - OTHER FUNCTIONS - BECAUSE NOT DETERMINED TO BE IGF IAW FAR 7.503(D))

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION
